footer.tagline: Solar mobility, engineering precision, and community impact.

home.title: Defy The Limits Of The Sun
home.subtitle: A dark-mode, performance-first experience inspired by your Stitch Final screens and connected to your live backend data.

sections.missionBody: We design, test, and race a high-efficiency solar vehicle while building an interdisciplinary engineering culture.
sections.routingBody: Each top-level section now has its own page: Vehicle, Team, Publications, About, and Support.

home.noPublication: No publication found yet in the database.

vehicle.title: Engineering Andina Telemetry
vehicle.subtitle: A performance dashboard narrative inspired by the Vehículo (Final) Stitch screen.

ai.title: AI Brain
ai.body: Predictive energy routing reacts to weather and race conditions in real time.

solar.title: Solar Capture
solar.body: Aerospace-grade panel integration maximizes photon capture across changing light conditions.

aero.title: Zero Resistance
aero.body: Composite bodywork and low-drag geometry focus on every watt of efficiency.

team.title: Team Members
team.subtitle: This page is fully populated from PostgreSQL through /api/members/.
team.searchPlaceholder: Search by member, role, or career
team.emptyBody: Create members in PostgreSQL and they will appear here automatically.

publications.title: Research And Updates
publications.subtitle: This page is fully populated from PostgreSQL through /api/publications/.
publications.emptyBody: You can insert one publication to validate the database connection and translation flow.

about.title: About Candelaria
about.subtitle: Mission, vision, values, and roadmap in one semantic page.
about.missionBody: Accelerate the transition toward autonomous clean-energy mobility with practical engineering and public impact.
about.visionBody: Build a robust ecosystem where each community can generate, monitor, and optimize energy with confidence.
about.valuesBody: Intrepidity, transparency, velocity, and synchronized collaboration guide how we design and deliver.

support.title: Support The Mission
support.subtitle: Elite memberships, direct contributions, and strategic sponsorship.
support.membershipBody: Offer layered support plans with exclusive perks, telemetry access, and sponsor visibility.
support.donationBody: Each contribution powers R&D, testing cycles, and student-led innovation.
